extortion.description: kabex.cz rocketreach.co/kabelovna-kabex-as-profile_b5947399f662772e Kabelovna Kabex is a Czech special cable manufacturer founded in 1994 . The company specializes in cables for nuclear power plants (including LOCA-cables), hermetic cable penetrations, and power cables up to 30 kV . Kabex is a key supplier to Czech and Slovak nuclear plants and has supplied projects like the Kudankulam NPP in India
